creator: spamfaenger@gmx.de
text:
I was advised at <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-quarterly/issues/322#issuecomment-764462461> that this might be the right place to track this feature request.

Basically, I would like an RSS feed, not for all of the news (as it exists here: <https://www.freebsd.org/news/rss.xml>) but only for <https://www.freebsd.org/news/status> which is much lower traffic.

What are the requirements to get this rolling?
